funding_carry.name: Funding-rate carry (delta-neutral)
funding_carry.economic_rationale: Spot long + perp short when funding is high: the perp shorts PAY me the funding. Real recurring cash flow, not a price prediction.

tests.note: pre-registered single config; pooled across 4 majors
pre-registered single config; pooled across 4 majors
Stage4 gauntlet 5/6 -> FAIL param_plateau (50% configs positive, param-sensitive). NOT deployable.
Continuous carry OVER-TRADES: net APR -4.14%/yr, 2/6. Selective(threshold) was better but fragile. Carry real but too small to robustly harvest at retail unleveraged w/ pessimistic costs.

basis_conv.name: Basis convergence
basis_conv.economic_rationale: Perp/futures price converges to spot at/over time; capture the spread as it closes.

liq_meanrev.name: Liquidation-cascade mean reversion
liq_meanrev.economic_rationale: Forced liquidations overshoot price; I provide liquidity into the cascade and fade it.

vol_momo_alts.name: Vol-filtered momentum on mid-cap alts
vol_momo_alts.economic_rationale: Institutions avoid small caps for capacity reasons, leaving momentum less arbitraged; trade it only in calm-vol regimes to cut whipsaw.

tsmom.name: Time-series momentum (vol-scaled)
tsmom.economic_rationale: Trend persistence: past positive return predicts near-term positive (Liu-Tsyvinski up to 8wk). Prediction, not cash flow -- must survive brutal costs.

tests.note: Stage4 gauntlet 3/6 -> FAIL pbo(0.76)+dsr(0)+falsification(p=0.15). No real edge. Rejected.

tsmom.notes: Research: TSMOM>CSMOM in crypto but gross often insignificant net of costs.
